name: SOC CrowdStrike Falcon IDP Integration Enhancement for Cortex XSIAM
description: Enhancements for CrowdStrike Falcon IDP Falcon IDP telemetry used by the SOC Framework on Cortex XSIAM. Reshapes events from `crowdstrike_falcon_event_raw` into properly-shaped XSIAM alerts with DS:CrowdStrike Falcon IDP/Falcon IDP tags so Foundation Product Classification routes them into the Identity category.
author: Palo Alto Networks
